content: node --test coverage threshold enforcement: --test-coverage-lines, --test-coverage-branches, --test-coverage-functions flags added in Node 22.8.0 (--test-coverage-lines) and similar. On Node 18/20 these flags do NOT exist — the process exits 0 regardless of coverage percentage. Setting thresholds in CI that only work on Node 22 will silently not enforce on the 18/20 matrix legs. The lcov reporter emits NO TAP output — if used as the only reporter, CI sees empty stdout and may pass or fail depending on exit code alone. Correct pattern: use two reporters simultaneously: --test-reporter=spec --test-reporter-destination=stdout --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=lcov.info. Coverage is Stability 1 (Experimental) through Node 22 LTS, meaning the API surface can change between patch releases.
